description_long: This is a finely detailed bust sculpture of a man, rendered in a light-colored stone or marble. The figure is depicted with wavy, shoulder-length hair and a solemn expression, wearing a formal garment with pleated, draped fabric over the shoulders and chest. The bust is mounted on a round pedestal base, and the craftsmanship highlights realistic facial features, including a prominent nose, defined cheekbones, and a slightly furrowed brow. The back of the sculpture shows the textured hair and the draped garment, with the shoulders and upper back clearly defined. The surface appears matte with subtle weathering, suggesting it may be displayed outdoors or in a public space. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or artist signatures on the sculpture itself.
description: A realistic bust of a man in formal attire, sculpted in light stone or marble with detailed facial features and draped clothing, mounted on a round pedestal.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the textured hair, draped garment, and the back of the shoulders and pedestal.
description_view_1: Three-quarter right view highlighting the man's profile, detailed facial features, and the pleated garment.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the full face, chest, and the intricate folds of the garment.
description_view_3: Three-quarter left rear view focusing on the back of the head, hair, and the draped garment over the shoulders.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
